description_long: This is a classic military-style SUV, reminiscent of the Willys MB Jeep, painted in matte olive drab with white military markings including a star on the hood and side. The vehicle features an open-top design with two simple bench seats, a flat windshield, and minimalistic dashboard controls. The spare tire is mounted on the rear, and a long radio antenna extends from the back. The wheels are rugged and utilitarian, designed for off-road use, and the body is constructed from robust metal panels. The front grille has vertical slats and round headlights, while the rear cargo area is open and accessible. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing function over comfort, with exposed metal surfaces and basic interior fittings.
description: A classic olive drab military SUV with an open top, white star markings, and rugged utilitarian features. It has a spare tire on the back, a flat windshield, and simple bench seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, two bench seats, spare tire at the rear, and the long antenna.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat windshield, vertical slat grille, round headlights, and the white star on the hood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the open cargo area and side star marking.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the spare tire, open cargo area, and the back of the bench seats.
attribute_wheel_design: solid steel wheels with simple circular pattern and no visible spokes
